message:
feat(ci): route test and e2e steps through rch with graceful fallback

CI matrix policy and workflow updates to use remote compilation helper
(rch) for all test execution steps, with automatic fallback to local
cargo/bash when rch is unavailable:

ci_matrix_policy.json:
- All 5 lanes now include require_rch: true and replay_command prefixed
  with "rch exec --" for deterministic remote reproduction
- Affected lanes: unit-tests, integration-tests, e2e-scenario-matrix,
  raptorq-forensics, perf-regression

ci.yml:
- Unit tests, integration tests, forensic logging gate, and perf
  regression gate all check for $RCH_BIN and route through rch exec
  when available, with echo-and-fallback to local execution otherwise

check_ci_matrix_policy.py:
- New require_rch field in LanePolicy dataclass
- Validation: when require_rch is true, assert replay_command contains
  "rch exec --" prefix, emitting "replay:rch_prefix" contract violation

ci_summary_report.py:
- Minor formatting adjustments for rch-prefixed replay commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -1061,10 +1061,26 @@ jobs:
             ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}-
 
       - name: Run unit tests
-        run: cargo test --lib --all-features
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          RCH_BIN="${RCH_BIN:-$HOME/.local/bin/rch}"
+          if [[ -x "$RCH_BIN" ]]; then
+            "$RCH_BIN" exec -- cargo test --lib --all-features
+          else
+            echo "rch unavailable; falling back to local cargo test --lib --all-features"
+            cargo test --lib --all-features
+          fi
 
       - name: Run integration tests
-        run: cargo test --test '*' --all-features
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          RCH_BIN="${RCH_BIN:-$HOME/.local/bin/rch}"
+          if [[ -x "$RCH_BIN" ]]; then
+            "$RCH_BIN" exec -- cargo test --test '*' --all-features
+          else
+            echo "rch unavailable; falling back to local cargo test --test '*' --all-features"
+            cargo test --test '*' --all-features
+          fi
 
       - name: Run doc tests
         run: cargo test --doc --all-features
@@ -1386,7 +1402,14 @@ jobs:

         run: |

           cp "$latest_dir/summary.json" phase6-artifacts/raptorq-forensics/summary.json
@@ -1397,14 +1420,27 @@ jobs:

+    return raw
+
+
 def load_policy(policy_path: Path) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], list[LanePolicy], Path, Path]:

+    if lane.require_rch and not rch_compliant:

     status = "pass" if not missing_contracts else "fail"

@@ -273,6 +287,25 @@ def run_self_tests() -> int:
     if "artifact:ci-summary-report" not in lane_fail["missing_contracts"]:
         raise AssertionError("expected missing artifact contract")
 
+    non_rch_lane = LanePolicy(
+        lane_id="unit-no-rch",
+        title="Unit lane without rch",
+        owner="runtime-core",
+        required_job_ids=("test",),
+        required_step_names=("Run unit tests",),
+        required_artifact_names=("ci-summary-report",),
+        replay_command="cargo test --lib --all-features",
+        require_rch=True,
+        failure_taxonomy=("unit_assertion_failure",),
+        max_failures=0,
+        required_artifacts_min=1,
+    )
+    lane_non_rch = evaluate_lane(non_rch_lane, workflow_pass, jobs_pass, steps_pass)
+    if lane_non_rch["status"] != "fail":
+        raise AssertionError("expected fail lane status when require_rch is true but replay command is non-rch")
+    if "replay:rch_prefix" not in lane_non_rch["missing_contracts"]:
+        raise AssertionError("expected replay:rch_prefix contract failure")
+
     print("CI matrix policy self-test passed")
     return 0

     events_path = args.events_output if str(args.events_output) else default_events_path
